title: Add AI Everywhere to chat
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt:
- Adds [AI Everywhere](https://greasyfork.org/en/scripts/419825-aigpt-everywhere) to chat
- Mini A.I. floating menu that can define words, answer questions, translate, generate images, and much more in a single click and with your custom prompts. Includes useful click to search on Google and

Fixes #10949

gist.headline: AI Everywhere joins the hive
gist.blurb: A new community project has sprouted! 'AI Everywhere' brings a floating AI menu to your browser for quick definitions, translations, and image generation.
gist.summary: Added the 'AI Everywhere' userscript to the community apps showcase, featuring a floating menu for quick text and image generation tasks directly from the browser.
gist.impact: Users can now discover and install the AI Everywhere script from the apps directory to access Pollinations AI capabilities from any webpage.
gist.visual_concept: The PR is about a floating AI menu/userscript that works everywhere. Visuals: Polly the bee interacting with floating digital menus or browser windows, representing the 'everywhere' aspect of the script.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee flying next to a floating digital menu panel filled with tiny glowing icons. A chunky retro computer monitor sits in the background displaying a web page. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley.
